envVars.name: CELESTRAK_GROUPS
envVars.description: Comma/space-separated CelesTrak GROUP views to poll, for example stations, active, starlink, or visual. Each GROUP is a curated catalog subset. Default: stations.

envVars.name: SUPGP_SOURCES
envVars.description: Comma/space-separated Supplemental GP sources to additionally fetch, for example SpaceX, Planet, or OneWeb. Empty disables SupGP. Default: empty.
